headline: 3 Criminally Undervalued Software Stocks to Back Up the Truck On
summary: Software stocks have always been expensive, up until a few months ago. Stocks like Procore Technologies (NYSE:PCOR), dLocal (NASDAQ:DLO), and Intuit (NASDAQ:INTU) have plunged significantly, and they’re not the only ones that have done so. Wall Street now believes AI will make the software-as-a-service (SaaS) business model much less profitable. And considering AI models now can easily make some ... 3 Criminally Undervalued Software Stocks to Back Up the Truck On

headline: Intuit Inc. (NASDAQ:INTU) Emerges as a Peter Lynch-Style GARP Investment Candidate
summary: Intuit (INTU) emerges as a strong GARP investment candidate, showing sustainable growth, high profitability, financial strength, and a reasonable valuation.
